name: Cavalcade of the Tenth Plague
description: Blood sacrifice zealots. Free Blessings each turn, Communicants cost Glory, reject resurrection.
add_rules: Blood of the Lamb: Castigators gain TOUGH keyword for free.
Day of His Wrath: War Prophet replaces Laying on of Hands with Day of His Wrath ACTION (Risky — Injury Roll IGNORE ARMOUR to enemy within 3", Crit adds +1 INJURY DICE).
Favour of the Lord: Place 1 free BLESSING MARKER on any warband model at start of each Turn.
Heaven Awaits: Trench Pilgrims cannot be resurrected as Martyr Penitents.
Only the Righteous: Any PILGRIM model (except Ecclesiastic Prisoners) can have Sacrificial Lamb for 5D (Consumable). Includes Anchorite Shrines.
Stolen Communicants: Communicants cost 3 Glory (instead of 100D).
The Unclean: Can only include 0-2 Ecclesiastic Prisoners.

War Prophet.add: Day of His Wrath ACTION: Risky — Injury Roll with IGNORE ARMOUR for 1 enemy within 3". +1 INJURY DICE on Critical.
